purpose: Per-parser-family AST-shape contract for the RTL frontend grammar. The entry rule `rtl_frontend_file := trivia design_item* trivia -> {type: "rtl_frontend_file", items: $2}` is a Sequence root with an object-literal annotation that drops at codegen for the tracked parser today.
doctrine: When per-family regeneration of generated/rtl_frontend_parser.rs lands, the entry sample's current_content_kind must flip to json_object and drift_status to aligned in the same commit.
